message:
feat(web): HelpOverlay now renders from ActionRegistry with Depth Layers

Refactored HelpOverlay to implement the Depth Layers philosophy from
the README keybinding conventions:

- Layer 0 (Core Controls): Navigation, View, Search - always visible
- Layer 1 (Quick Overlays): Single-key analysis toggles (g, x, b, etc.)
- Layer 2 (Analysis Menu): Advanced tools with modifier keys
- Layer 3 (Simulation Hub): Interactive simulations
- Layer 4 (Power User): Command palette and dev tools

Key changes:
- Added getDepthLayer() function to classify actions by layer based on
  category, shortcut complexity, and action ID
- Grouped shortcuts by layer instead of raw category names
- Added layer headers with L0-L4 badges and descriptions
- Added "contextual" scope badges for non-global shortcuts
- Essential mode shows only Layer 0; Detailed mode shows all layers
- All shortcuts derived from ActionRegistry - no hardcoded lists

Closes: phage_explorer-s4qx.1.3
